name: stash-copilot
description: AI-powered assistant for your [StashApp](https://github.com/stashapp/stash) library. Chat with your library, get insights, and analyze scenes using vision AI.

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p assets && cp node_modules/marked/lib/marked.umd.js assets/marked.min.js && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js assets/purify.min.js && cp node_modules/plotly.js-gl3d-dist-min/plotly-gl3d.min.js assets/plotly-gl3d.min.js
